maintenance_suppression: Mute route=default and component=worker-uplift-rabbitmq only during approved production-vps maintenance windows.

dashboards.title: NutsNews Worker-Uplift Pipeline SLOs
dashboards.description: Worker-uplift RabbitMQ availability, canary, stage, retry/DLQ, publication, feed freshness, and telemetry quota SLO/error-budget signals.
dashboards.missingRemoteObjectReason: New source-controlled SLO dashboard for ramideltoro/nutsnews-worker#90; OpenTofu creates it in the backend Grafana folder.

panels.title: Broker Availability SLI
panels.description: Minimum RabbitMQ aggregate and queue scrape availability for the selected host.

panels.title: Canary Success
panels.description: Latest private AMQP canary success from backend textfile metrics.

panels.title: Canary Latency
panels.description: Latest canary publish-confirm to manual-ack latency.

panels.title: Canary Message Age
panels.description: Age of the canary message at consume time.

panels.title: Stage Success Ratio
panels.description: Future worker service stage-event success ratio; remains empty until worker metrics are deployed.

panels.title: Stage P95 Latency
panels.description: Future worker service stage latency SLO query; remains empty until worker histogram metrics are deployed.

panels.title: Retry And DLQ Budget Ratio
panels.description: Redelivery and DLQ pressure compared with acknowledgement throughput.
panels.expr: ((sum(rate(rabbitmq_detailed_queue_messages_redelivered_total{job="nutsnews-rabbitmq-queues",environment=~"$environment",host=~"$host",queue=~"$queue"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) + ((sum(rabbitmq_detailed_queue_messages_ready{job="nutsnews-rabbitmq-queues",environment=~"$environment",host=~"$host",queue=~".*\\.dlq$"}) or vector(0)) / 60)) / clamp_min((sum(rate(rabbitmq_detailed_queue_messages_acked_total{job="nutsnews-rabbitmq-queues",environment=~"$environment",host=~"$host",queue=~"$queue"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)), 1)

panels.title: Publication Success Ratio
panels.description: Future final publication success SLO query; remains empty until publication service metrics are deployed.

panels.title: Feed Freshness Age
panels.description: Future end-to-end feed freshness SLO query; remains empty until worker freshness metrics are deployed.

panels.title: Worker-Uplift Alert State
panels.description: Grafana alert state for worker-uplift RabbitMQ and SLO guardrails.

panels.title: Canary Fixture Signal
panels.description: Deliberate #91 drill fixture signal used to exercise alert firing and recovery.

panels.title: RabbitMQ Recovery Proof Age
panels.description: Age of the latest sanitized RabbitMQ definition export proof from backend textfile metrics.

slos.target: 99% successful stage events and p95 latency under 30 seconds
retry and DLQ budget ratio below 1%

alerts.title: NutsNews worker-uplift RabbitMQ broker down
alerts.threshold_description: broker scrape down for 2m or network-interruption fixture active
alerts.summary: RabbitMQ broker or detailed queue scrape is down for worker uplift.
alerts.description: Broker availability is below the #90 SLO and the private AMQP path may be unavailable.

alerts.title: NutsNews worker-uplift RabbitMQ canary failed
alerts.threshold_description: canary success below 1 or deliberate failure fixture active
alerts.summary: The private RabbitMQ AMQP canary is failing.
alerts.description: The canary publish-confirm, consume, validate, and manual-ack path did not complete.

alerts.title: NutsNews worker-uplift Alloy metrics write loss
alerts.expr: (sum(increase(prometheus_remote_storage_samples_failed_total{job="nutsnews-backend-host",environment="production",instance="backend.nutsnews.com"}[10m])) or vector(0)) + (clamp_min(max(prometheus_remote_storage_samples_pending{job="nutsnews-backend-host",environment="production",instance="backend.nutsnews.com"}) - 500, 0) or vector(0)) + (max(absent(prometheus_remote_storage_samples_pending{job="nutsnews-backend-host",environment="production",instance="backend.nutsnews.com"})) or vector(0)) + (max(nutsnews_backend_rabbitmq_canary_failure_fixture{environment="production",instance="backend.nutsnews.com",failure_class="grafana-connectivity-loss"}) or vector(0))
alerts.threshold_description: remote-write failures above 0 or pending samples above 500
alerts.summary: Alloy is losing or backing up worker-uplift telemetry writes.
alerts.description: Grafana Cloud cannot be trusted for RabbitMQ alerting while remote-write failures or sustained pending samples are present.

alerts.title: NutsNews worker-uplift work exists with no consumers
alerts.expr: (((sum(rabbitmq_detailed_queue_messages_ready{job="nutsnews-rabbitmq-queues",environment="production",host="backend.nutsnews.com",queue=~"nutsnews\\.worker\\.(fetch|canonicalization|enrichment|approval|translation|persistence|publication)\\.v1"}) > bool 0) * (sum(rabbitmq_detailed_queue_consumers{job="nutsnews-rabbitmq-queues",environment="production",host="backend.nutsnews.com",queue=~"nutsnews\\.worker\\.(fetch|canonicalization|enrichment|approval|translation|persistence|publication)\\.v1"}) == bool 0)) or vector(0)) + (max(nutsnews_backend_rabbitmq_canary_failure_fixture{environment="production",instance="backend.nutsnews.com",failure_class="consumer-loss"}) or vector(0))
alerts.threshold_description: ready main-queue work with zero consumers for 5m
alerts.summary: Worker-uplift queues have work but no active consumers.
alerts.description: A stage can no longer drain work; inspect worker runtime services before allowing production traffic.

alerts.title: NutsNews worker-uplift backlog or oldest age sustained
alerts.expr: ((max(rabbitmq_detailed_queue_messages_ready{job="nutsnews-rabbitmq-queues",environment="production",host="backend.nutsnews.com",queue=~"nutsnews\\.worker\\.(fetch|canonicalization|enrichment|approval|translation|persistence|publication)\\.v1"}) > bool 100) or vector(0)) + ((max(nutsnews_worker_uplift_queue_oldest_age_seconds{environment="production",queue=~"nutsnews\\.worker\\..*\\.v1"}) > bool 1800) or vector(0)) + (max(nutsnews_backend_rabbitmq_canary_failure_fixture{environment="production",instance="backend.nutsnews.com",failure_class="full-queue"}) or vector(0))
alerts.threshold_description: main queue depth over 100 or oldest age over 1800s for 30m
alerts.summary: Worker-uplift backlog or oldest-message age is sustained.
alerts.description: The queue path is draining too slowly; check service throughput, retry pressure, and downstream dependencies.

alerts.title: NutsNews worker-uplift publish and ack imbalance
alerts.threshold_description: publish rate exceeds ack rate by more than 1 message/sec for 15m
alerts.summary: Worker-uplift publish rate is materially above ack rate.
alerts.description: Ingress is outpacing worker acknowledgements; inspect consumers, retry queues, and downstream services.

alerts.title: NutsNews worker-uplift unacked messages growing
alerts.threshold_description: positive unacked growth slope above 0.1 for 15m
alerts.summary: Worker-uplift unacked messages are growing.
alerts.description: Delivered messages are not being acknowledged fast enough; inspect worker health and ack/error handling.

alerts.title: NutsNews worker-uplift DLQ is non-empty
alerts.threshold_description: any ready terminal DLQ message
alerts.summary: One or more worker-uplift terminal DLQs contain messages.
alerts.description: Preserve DLQ evidence before replay or purge. Do not publish production articles while investigating.

alerts.title: NutsNews worker-uplift retry or redelivery excessive
alerts.expr: (sum(rate(rabbitmq_detailed_queue_messages_redelivered_total{job="nutsnews-rabbitmq-queues",environment="production",host="backend.nutsnews.com"}[10m])) or vector(0)) + ((sum(rabbitmq_detailed_queue_messages_ready{job="nutsnews-rabbitmq-queues",environment="production",host="backend.nutsnews.com",queue=~".*\\.retry-(30s|5m|30m)$"}) or vector(0)) / 100) + (max(nutsnews_backend_rabbitmq_canary_failure_fixture{environment="production",instance="backend.nutsnews.com",failure_class=~"poison-message|full-queue"}) or vector(0))
alerts.threshold_description: redelivery rate plus retry depth pressure above 0.5 for 10m
alerts.summary: Worker-uplift retries or redeliveries are excessive.
alerts.description: Retry pressure is burning the retry/DLQ SLO; inspect failure classes before increasing traffic.

alerts.title: NutsNews worker-uplift RabbitMQ connection churn
alerts.threshold_description: more than 10 connection-count changes in 15m
alerts.summary: RabbitMQ connection count is churning.
alerts.description: Connection churn can indicate crash loops, credential failures, network instability, or reconnection storms.

alerts.title: NutsNews worker-uplift RabbitMQ memory or disk alarm
alerts.expr: (max(rabbitmq_alarms{job="nutsnews-rabbitmq",environment="production",host="backend.nutsnews.com"} or rabbitmq_alarms_memory_used_watermark{job="nutsnews-rabbitmq",environment="production",host="backend.nutsnews.com"} or rabbitmq_alarms_free_disk_space_watermark{job="nutsnews-rabbitmq",environment="production",host="backend.nutsnews.com"}) or vector(0)) + (max(nutsnews_backend_rabbitmq_canary_failure_fixture{environment="production",instance="backend.nutsnews.com",failure_class="disk-watermark"}) or vector(0))
alerts.threshold_description: any RabbitMQ memory or disk alarm
alerts.summary: RabbitMQ reports a memory or disk alarm.
alerts.description: Broker resource alarms can block publishers or consumers. Free resources before replaying traffic.

alerts.title: NutsNews worker-uplift RabbitMQ low disk
alerts.expr: ((min(rabbitmq_node_disk_free{job="nutsnews-rabbitmq",environment="production",host="backend.nutsnews.com"} or rabbitmq_disk_space_available_bytes{job="nutsnews-rabbitmq",environment="production",host="backend.nutsnews.com"}) < bool 1073741824) or vector(0)) + (max(nutsnews_backend_rabbitmq_canary_failure_fixture{environment="production",instance="backend.nutsnews.com",failure_class="disk-watermark"}) or vector(0))
alerts.threshold_description: RabbitMQ free disk below 1 GiB for 5m
alerts.summary: RabbitMQ free disk is below the critical guardrail.
alerts.description: Low disk can stop broker writes. Free disk or expand storage before increasing traffic.

alerts.title: NutsNews worker-uplift RabbitMQ descriptor pressure
alerts.threshold_description: file descriptor usage above 80% for 15m
alerts.summary: RabbitMQ file descriptor usage is high.
alerts.description: Descriptor pressure can precede connection failures. Check connection churn and broker limits.

alerts.title: NutsNews worker-uplift RabbitMQ recovery proof stale
alerts.threshold_description: sanitized definition export proof older than 7 days
alerts.summary: RabbitMQ recovery evidence is stale or missing.
alerts.description: Recovery proof must stay fresh before relying on worker-uplift RabbitMQ for production traffic.

alerts.title: NutsNews worker-uplift RabbitMQ repeated restarts
alerts.threshold_description: more than 1 RabbitMQ restart in 6h
alerts.summary: RabbitMQ restarted repeatedly.
alerts.description: Repeated broker restarts burn availability budget. Inspect service logs, Docker state, and recent deploys.

alerts.title: NutsNews worker-uplift broker availability burn rate
alerts.expr: (((avg_over_time((1 - min(up{job=~"nutsnews-rabbitmq|nutsnews-rabbitmq-queues",environment="production",host="backend.nutsnews.com"}))[1h:1m]) > bool 0.072) * (avg_over_time((1 - min(up{job=~"nutsnews-rabbitmq|nutsnews-rabbitmq-queues",environment="production",host="backend.nutsnews.com"}))[5m:1m]) > bool 0.072)) or vector(0)) + (max(nutsnews_backend_rabbitmq_canary_failure_fixture{environment="production",instance="backend.nutsnews.com",failure_class=~"broker-down|network-interruption"}) or vector(0))
alerts.threshold_description: 99.5% availability SLO burns faster than 14.4x on 5m and 1h windows
alerts.summary: RabbitMQ broker availability is burning error budget quickly.
alerts.description: Pause worker-uplift promotion and recover broker availability before allowing more traffic.

alerts.title: NutsNews worker-uplift stage latency SLO breach
alerts.threshold_description: stage p95 latency above 30s for 15m
alerts.summary: Worker-uplift stage latency exceeds the SLO threshold.
alerts.description: Future worker metric alert; idle or not-yet-deployed workers must remain no-data OK.

alerts.title: NutsNews worker-uplift feed freshness SLO breach
alerts.threshold_description: feed freshness age above 1800s for 15m
alerts.summary: Worker-uplift end-to-end feed freshness exceeds the SLO threshold.
alerts.description: Future worker metric alert; remains no-data OK until feed freshness telemetry is deployed.

alerts.title: NutsNews worker-uplift retry DLQ burn rate
alerts.expr: (((((sum(rate(rabbitmq_detailed_queue_messages_redelivered_total{job="nutsnews-rabbitmq-queues",environment="production",host="backend.nutsnews.com"}[1h])) or vector(0)) + ((sum(rabbitmq_detailed_queue_messages_ready{job="nutsnews-rabbitmq-queues",environment="production",host="backend.nutsnews.com",queue=~".*\\.dlq$"}) or vector(0)) / 60)) / clamp_min((sum(rate(rabbitmq_detailed_queue_messages_acked_total{job="nutsnews-rabbitmq-queues",environment="production",host="backend.nutsnews.com"}[1h])) or vector(0)), 1)) > bool 0.01) * (((((sum(rate(rabbitmq_detailed_queue_messages_redelivered_total{job="nutsnews-rabbitmq-queues",environment="production",host="backend.nutsnews.com"}[5m])) or vector(0)) + ((sum(rabbitmq_detailed_queue_messages_ready{job="nutsnews-rabbitmq-queues",environment="production",host="backend.nutsnews.com",queue=~".*\\.dlq$"}) or vector(0)) / 60)) / clamp_min((sum(rate(rabbitmq_detailed_queue_messages_acked_total{job="nutsnews-rabbitmq-queues",environment="production",host="backend.nutsnews.com"}[5m])) or vector(0)), 1)) > bool 0.01)) or vector(0)) + (max(nutsnews_backend_rabbitmq_canary_failure_fixture{environment="production",instance="backend.nutsnews.com",failure_class=~"poison-message|full-queue"}) or vector(0))
alerts.threshold_description: retry/DLQ budget ratio above 1% on 5m and 1h windows
alerts.summary: Worker-uplift retry/DLQ rate is burning error budget quickly.
alerts.description: Stop promotion until DLQ evidence is preserved and the failing stage is isolated.

alerts.title: NutsNews worker-uplift final publication success SLO breach
alerts.threshold_description: publication failure ratio above 1% for 15m
alerts.summary: Worker-uplift final publication success is below SLO.
alerts.description: Future worker metric alert. Guardrail must not publish production articles or enable cutover by itself.
